## Checklist

- [ ] Builds cleanly: `cmake --build build`
- [ ] Tests pass: `ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure`
- [ ] Added/updated tests in the right tier (unit / functional / integration)
- [ ] Consistent with `PROJECT_PLAN.md` / `CLAUDE.md` (terminology, modules, invariants)
- [ ] Updated docs (README / spec) if behavior or interfaces changed
- [ ] CI is green
